task_completion.description: Open the original base.slvs file in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace application window is visible with a 3D box model loaded. The title bar or property browser should display 'base.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Locate and select a dimension constraint for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint on the 3D model is highlighted or double-clicked, opening a text input box or activating the property browser to edit the dimension.

task_completion.description: Update the width constraint to 150.00 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input box or property browser for the width dimension shows the entered value '150' or '150.00', and the 3D model updates its width accordingly.

task_completion.description: Update the height constraint to 120.00 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input box or property browser for the height dimension shows the entered value '120' or '120.00', and the 3D model updates its height accordingly.

task_completion.description: Save the modified part to base_enlarged.slvs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' file dialog is open with 'base_enlarged.slvs' entered as the filename in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory, or the SolveSpace window title bar updates to 'base_enlarged.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace graphical user interface to modify the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application window with the 3D view and property browser being used, rather than a text editor or terminal modifying the .slvs file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually edited the parametric constraints using the software's dimensioning tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text input dialog for dimension constraints is visible, showing the new values being entered into the CAD software's native UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the Save As dialog to create the new file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace 'Save As' file picker dialog is visible at least once during the trajectory, rather than the agent using terminal commands like 'cp' to duplicate the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/base_enlarged.slvs. The target width constraint is 150.0 mm and the target height constraint is 120.0 mm.
